summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NSRSN pitch deck feature - all core functionality working correctly

ui_bugs.issue: Previous button click intercepted by overlay element causing timeout
ui_bugs.impact: Minor - navigation still works via keyboard and dots

passed_tests: All 8 slides accessible and display correctly
Navigation dots (8 total) navigate to correct slides
Progress bar updates as slides change
Slide counter shows current/total slides correctly
Back to site link navigates to main landing page
Demo slide interactive map with Simulate button works
Map simulation shows ice detection, temperature readings, API responses
Comparison matrix displays properly on slide 3
Main site navbar has working Pitch Deck link
Slide transitions and animations work smoothly
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Add force=true or z-index adjustment to prevent overlay interception of navigation buttons. Otherwise pitch deck is fully functional.
